Home / Service Areas / Chandler

Carpenter in Chandler, AZ

Trusted local professionals serving Chandler and surrounding communities

Serving Chandler, AZ

Triple Digit Wood Design is pleased to offer its carpentry expertise to the growing community of Chandler, Arizona. Known for its well-planned developments and family-friendly atmosphere, Chandler presents a unique blend of modern living and traditional values. We provide a wide range of carpentry services tailored to the needs of Chandler homeowners. Many homes in Chandler were built in the 1990s and 2000s, featuring contemporary designs and functional layouts. We excel at creating custom storage solutions, updating kitchens and bathrooms, and enhancing outdoor living spaces to complement these modern homes. We are committed to providing Chandler residents with high-quality carpentry that enhances the beauty and value of their homes.

Chandler is a large suburb of Phoenix characterized by planned communities and a thriving tech industry.

Carpenter Services in Chandler

Custom Cabinetry

Elevate your space with handcrafted cabinets tailored to your exact needs.

Learn more →

Deck & Patio Construction

Extend your living space outdoors with a custom-designed deck or patio.

Learn more →

Pergolas & Shade Structures

Beat the Arizona heat with a custom pergola or shade structure.

Learn more →

Custom Furniture

Unique, handcrafted furniture designed to fit your style and space.

Learn more →

Door & Window Installation

Upgrade your home with energy-efficient doors and windows.

Learn more →

Trim & Molding Installation

Add elegance and detail to your home with custom trim and molding.

Learn more →

Home Renovations & Remodels

Transform your living space with expert renovation and remodeling services.

Learn more →
